main_heading.title: Dormitory Application Results Management
main_heading.subtitle: Monitor and analyze application period statistics, manage student acceptance stages, and upload accepted and rejected lists

note.title: Guidelines for Managing and Processing Admission Data
note.description:
Please follow the protocol below to ensure accurate system updates:

1. Data Review: You can extract student data and classify it according to the specified time periods, with a comprehensive audit of the submitted information.
2. Technical Evaluation: Acceptance and exclusion criteria (security, academic, and geographic) defined in the regulations are applied to each record individually.
3. Final Export: After approving acceptance or rejection decisions, the final file is prepared and uploaded in a supported format.
4. Integrity Verification: Please review the file before the final upload, as this process will immediately and directly update the results in the main system database.

download_students.title: Download Student Data (Excel & Word)
download_students.description: Download Excel and Word files containing completed student applications organized and formatted by student type. The Excel file includes detailed data, while the Word file contains Egyptian national ID card images for each student arranged for easy review and printing.
